heroTitle: Make wellness a habit, not a splurge
heroSubtitle: Monthly membership means built-in service credits, member pricing, and priority booking, so your next facial, massage, or wax is already taken care of.
plan1Perk1: 1 signature service credit each month (any facial, massage, or Brazilian wax)
plan1Perk2: 10% off additional services booked same visit
plan1Perk3: Unused credits roll over up to 1 month
plan2Perk1: 2 service credits each month, mix and match any treatment
plan2Perk2: 15% off additional services and retail add-ons
plan2Perk3: Priority access to Saturday booking windows
plan2Perk4: Unused credits roll over up to 2 months
plan3Perk2: 2 facial or massage credits each month
plan3Perk3: 20% off everything else in the treatment menu
footerNote: Membership pricing and perks above are default starter tiers for planning purposes. Confirm final pricing, credit rules, and cancellation terms with Grisel before this goes live.
ctaSubtitle: Call, message, or book your first session and we'll get you set up on the plan that fits.
